overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the sunlit historic city of Beauclair. The character traverses cobblestone streets, terraces with ornamental pools, and garden overlooks with panoramic mountain views, showcasing the game's distinctive warm color palette and Renaissance-inspired architecture.

events.description: passing through stone archway into open street
decorative fountain pool becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the historic street with swords visible on his back

entered.detail: large stone archway marking entrance to the street
multi-story historic townhouses with arched windows and balconies
ornamental water feature with stone basin
flower pots with red blooms placed along the building

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt walking through a stone archway into a historic cobblestone street lined with multi-story stone townhouses. The warm golden light illuminates the scene as a decorative fountain pool comes into view on the right, accompanied by potted red flowers along the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace walkway with mountain views

events.description: emerging from enclosed street onto open terrace with balustrade

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace overlooking the valley and distant mountains

entered.detail: ornate stone railing along the terrace edge
long rectangular pool with calm water reflecting the sky
blue mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed street, the scene opens onto a wide terrace with a stone balustrade overlooking the valley. An ornamental reflecting pool stretches along the right side while distant mountains become visible against the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone staircase along retaining wall

events.description: beginning ascent of steep stone staircase
stone wall temporarily blocks view of mountains while climbing

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs along the terrace wall toward the upper garden

entered.detail: steep stone steps with worn surfaces
tall stone wall supporting the upper terrace
blue lake visible between mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase flanked by a tall retaining wall on the right. As he climbs, the view shifts to reveal a distant lake between the mountain peaks, though the wall occasionally occludes the panoramic view.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden terrace with panoramic valley overlook

events.description: emerging from stairs into formal garden terrace
encountering armored guard standing at the overlook railing

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden terrace, pausing to look at the panoramic view of the valley and lake

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing at the balustrade looking out at the view

entered.detail: large ornamental bushes with bright red blooms in stone planters
stone seating along the terrace edge
cluster of orange roof tiles from lower buildings
expansive view of valley, lake, and distant mountains

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a formal garden terrace, the scene reveals vibrant red flowering bushes and stone benches overlooking the valley. An armored guard stands at the railing admiring the panoramic view of terracotta rooftops, the blue lake, and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded lower courtyard with grand staircase

events.description: beginning descent into lower garden level

agents.ego_description: walking down through the garden and entering a shaded stone corridor

notable_agents.action: figure in blue armor sitting on a stone bench

entered.detail: dark stone archway leading to lower levels
trimmed green hedges lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the garden terrace into a lower courtyard, passing manicured box hedges and a grand stone staircase. The lighting shifts to mixed as he approaches and enters a shaded stone archway tunnel, passing a seated figure in blue armor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit historic city that transitions from enclosed cobblestone streets to expansive mountain overlooks and finally into a shaded courtyard. It begins as Geralt passes through a stone archway into a street lined with townhouses and red flowers, where warm golden light illuminates a decorative fountain. As the character emerges from the street, the scene opens onto a wide terrace with a reflecting pool and a stone balustrade overlooking a distant mountain range. The camera then follows an ascent up a steep stone staircase, momentarily obscured by a retaining wall, before breaking out onto a formal garden terrace filled with vibrant red bushes and a guard gazing over terracotta rooftops and a blue lake. Finally, the movement descends through manicured box hedges into a lower courtyard, where the bright sunlight shifts to mixed lighting as the character enters a shaded stone archway tunnel.
